{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Horse Award
|class_id=20089
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Golden Horse Award is the most prestigious honor bestowed by the Pan-African Film Festival of Ouagadougou. Its goal is to foster the African film industry, promote indigenous film culture, and showcase African cinema to the world.
|fame=16
|art=15
|fth=13
|civ=30
|tech=16
|ss1=Per Rift Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +6<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 40/40
|ss2=Per Rift Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +8<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 40/40
|ss3=Per Rift Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +10<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 40/40
|ss4=Per Rift Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +10<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 40/40
|ss7=Per Rift Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +10<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
